videos.title: AGI is not coming!
videos.description:
jack Morris's investigation into GPT-OSS training data

https://x.com/jxmnop/status/1953899426075816164?t=3YRhVQDwQLk2gouTSACoqA&s=09
videos.highlights: The video challenges the imminent arrival of AGI by examining GPT-OSS training data, suggesting current AI models may lack the fundamental breakthroughs needed for true general intelligence. It presents evidence that scaling existing architectures alone may not lead to AGI, emphasizing the gap between narrow AI capabilities and human-like reasoning.
videos.worthReading: This critical perspective from a respected AI researcher offers valuable skepticism about AGI timelines, grounded in technical analysis of training data rather than philosophical speculation.
